drafter.PromptTemplate: Write a two-sentence draft product description for a fictional CLI tool called Aer Flow, a workflow execution engine. Write only the draft text itself -- no preamble, no markdown formatting.

reviewer.PromptTemplate: Read the draft product description at the input path shown below and write a short one-paragraph review of it: one sentence noting a strength, one sentence suggesting an improvement. Write only the review text itself -- no preamble, no markdown formatting.
